mapper.select: select line_no, line_name, line_status, process_flow_id as flow_id, pf.flow_name from production_lines pl left join process_flows pf on pl.process_flow_id = pf.id order by line_no
mapper.insert: insert into production_lines(line_no, line_name, line_status, process_flow_id) value (#{lineNo}, #{lineName}, #{lineStatus}, #{flowId})
mapper.update:
update production_lines
line_no = #{productionLine.lineNo},
line_name = #{productionLine.lineName},
process_flow_id = #{productionLine.flowId},
where line_no = #{lineCode}
mapper.select: SELECT wt.team_no as teamNo, wt.team_name as teamName, COALESCE(JSON_OBJECTAGG( COALESCE(s.process_name, '无工序'), COALESCE(s.process_count, 0) ), JSON_OBJECT()) as processMatrix FROM work_teams wt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT team_no, process_name, COUNT(*) as process_count FROM skills WHERE choose = 1 AND process_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY team_no, process_name ) s ON wt.team_no = s.team_no WHERE wt.line_no = #{lineNo} GROUP BY wt.team_no, wt.team_name

SELECT wt.team_no as teamNo, wt.team_name as teamName, COALESCE(JSON_OBJECTAGG( COALESCE(s.process_name, 'NO_PROCESS'), COALESCE(s.process_count, 0) ), JSON_OBJECT()) as processMatrix FROM work_teams wt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT team_no, process_name, COUNT(*) as process_count FROM skills WHERE choose = 1 AND process_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY team_no, process_name ) s ON wt.team_no = s.team_no WHERE wt.line_no IS NULL GROUP BY wt.team_no, wt.team_name
